allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix UI layout issues, scrollbar styling, and vault navigation

- Fix dashboard top stats cards overflowing their grid container
  by adding height: 100%, box-sizing, and overflow: hidden to
  shadow DOM card styles in all three components
- Fix bottom panel cards \(events/processes\) with fixed 600px height
  and flexbox layout for proper scroll containment
- Fix vault password viewer icon alignment: separate label from
  password-field wrapper so icons center on the input, add
  padding-right to prevent text overflow under icons
- Restyle scrollbars app-wide: thinner \(5px\), transparent track,
  pill-shaped thumb, hidden arrows, Firefox support
- Add /index.html route to FastAPI so vault back button works
- Add quarantine/ to .gitignore
- Remove debug logging from process-list.js and index.html

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "powershell -NoProfile -Command ""Start-Process cmd.exe -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList ''/c netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=""Citadel Archer Tailscale"" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8000 remoteip=100.64.0.0/10 & pause''""")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -like ''*Tailscale*'' } | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, ifIndex")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -like ""*Tailscale*"" } | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, ifIndex')
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Process python | Where-Object {$_Id -ne $PID} | Select-Object Id,StartTime")
